- MAWB: 1058 (master bills/consolidations)

- MAWB emitted: 1058 consolidations

- Export Aereo HAWB: USA dominates with 89.5% (1121 shipments), Brazil 4.7%, Australia 2.9%
- Crosstrade Aereo HAWB: India→USA (125), UK→USA (60), Turkey→USA (19)
- MAWB Export: USA 85.7%, Brazil 6.6%, Australia 3.9%
- MAWB Crosstrade: India→USA (63), UK→USA (23)

**Top Correspondents:**
- HAWB: Mid America Overseas Inc (420), John S James Co (115), Pioneer International Corp (115)
- MAWB Recipients: Mid-America Overseas Inc (257), John S. James Co. (113), Pioneer International Corp (104)

This is a major discovery/analysis result showing the geographic distribution and partner network.
